label: gpt-image-2
descriptiveGuide: A 15-minute core circuit: 30-second plank, 15 dead bugs per side, and 15 bird-dogs per side. Repeat 3 rounds with 30 seconds rest between exercises. Keep your lower back pressed into the floor during dead bugs.
imagePrompt: Instructional illustration split into two panels: dead bug (supine, opposite arm and leg extended, lower back pressed into floor) and bird-dog (quadruped, opposite arm and leg extended, neutral spine). Use arrows to highlight limb extension and stable pelvis/spine. Minimal background, clean anatomical style, annotated form cues with arrows, no text banners.
